FlashPlanner 1.2.21+8fe9e71eb082ad214d605da77c1c90cca82823ad
Copyright (C) 2026 Kristian Skov Johansen

  domain                     Required. Path to the domain file

  problem                    Required. Path to the problem file

  search                     What search algorithm to use

  translator                 What translator to use

  alias                      An alias that represents a configuration for the
                             search and translation

  print-plan                 (Default: false) Should the resulting plan be
                             printed to stdout?

  plan                       (Default: solution.plan) Target output plan file

  translator-time-limit      (Default: -1) Time limit for the translator in
                             seconds. (-1 is no time limit)

  search-time-limit          (Default: -1) Time limit for the search in seconds.
                             (-1 is no time limit)

  translator-memory-limit    (Default: -1) Memory limit for the translator in
                             MB. (-1 is no limit)

  search-memory-limit        (Default: -1) Memory limit for the search in MB.
                             (-1 is no limit)

  validate                   (Default: false) If the final plan that is found
                             should be validated with PlanVal

  help                       Display more information on a specific command.

  version                    Display version information.

Copyright (C) 2026 Kristian Skov Johansen

  domain                     Required. Path to the domain file

  problem                    Required. Path to the problem file

  search                     What search algorithm to use

  translator                 What translator to use

  alias                      An alias that represents a configuration for the
                             search and translation

  print-plan                 (Default: false) Should the resulting plan be
                             printed to stdout?

  plan                       (Default: solution.plan) Target output plan file

  translator-time-limit      (Default: -1) Time limit for the translator in
                             seconds. (-1 is no time limit)

  search-time-limit          (Default: -1) Time limit for the search in seconds.
                             (-1 is no time limit)

  translator-memory-limit    (Default: -1) Memory limit for the translator in
                             MB. (-1 is no limit)

  search-memory-limit        (Default: -1) Memory limit for the search in MB.
                             (-1 is no limit)

  validate                   (Default: false) If the final plan that is found
                             should be validated with PlanVal

  help                       Display more information on a specific command.

  version                    Display version information.


Option 'help' is unknown.
Required option 'domain' is missing.
Required option 'problem' is missing.
